case_title: VAL-PAK OF SAN FRANCISCO VS WANG, WEN YANG et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VAL-PAK OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WANG, WEN YANG WANG, STEPHANY $795.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $815.00, WEN YENG IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE-NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
INVALID POS AS TO DEFT STEPHANG WANG. ONE DEFT PER POS FORM.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, WEN YANG WANG, STEPHANY
